title: EmDash CMS
summary: Modern TypeScript CMS built on Astro. A spiritual successor to WordPress.
content: EmDash CMS with server-side rendering, rich text editing via Portable Text, media management, and a plugin system. Uses SQLite by default with optional PostgreSQL for production scale. Built on the Quant Node.js base image with full platform integration.

secrets.name: EMDASH_AUTH_SECRET
secrets.description: Authentication signing key for session tokens

secrets.name: EMDASH_PREVIEW_SECRET
secrets.description: Secret key for content preview mode
